Created attachment 214624
Update devel/mill to 0.7.2

Hi,

and another bug fix release for mill, meaning an update to 0.7.2. :)

Changelog
---------

- BSP fixes and workaround for cross projects
- update Bloop
- Fix fail `scalareformat` task execution when config file not exists

Kind regards,

Jens
